description: 10 valid Sortino values + 5 sentinel values (1e6). Sentinel is the project-specific value returned by compute_sortino_ratio when downside_deviation==0. Expected moments are computed on the 10 valid values only.
sentinel_source: autotuner.py compute_sortino_ratio: returns 1e6 when downside_deviation==0 (line ~118). Not a failure — trial succeeded but all returns beat target. Pollutes cross-trial distribution as an extreme outlier.

dsr_scenario.derivation: autotuner.compute_deflated_sharpe_ratio(SR_obs=1.5, SR_0=SR_0, gamma3=gamma3, gamma4=gamma4, T=60). With valid-only: SR_0=1.368, gamma3=0.448, gamma4=2.2. With polluted: SR_0=1168041.45, gamma3=0.707, gamma4=1.5. Difference of 19M+ shows severity of sentinel pollution.

derivation.population_variance_divisor: N (not N-1): consistent with autotuner.py line ~733
